description: A marketing initiative requires setting up a new email campaign for eco-conscious customers. Using the lead details in the CSV file on the Desktop (eco_leads.csv), create a mailing list named "Eco-Conscious Interest Group" and import the contacts. Create a new mailing with the subject "Introducing our new Sustainable Bamboo Collection" and the body text "Use code BAMBOO25 for 25% off your first order". Schedule this mailing to be sent exactly 3 days from today at 09:00 AM. Login credentials: admin@example.com / admin.

metadata.target_subject: Introducing our new Sustainable Bamboo Collection
